sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n29242" key="du/smhnis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">δύσ-μηνις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ι</itype>, <sense id="n29242.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">wrathful</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">θεός</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:1:39" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.39</biblScope> </bibl> </cit>; <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">χόλος</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.69</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (<placeName TEIform="placeName">Parmenion</placeName>).</sense> </entryFree>
